title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Judge, Reiju, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Shut up, give it back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: O... Ouch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who do you think you are?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't you ever touch me, moron!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Haha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So weak! What a loser!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bwaha Haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All 4 of us may have been born on the same day, but you're totally the black sheep of the bunch!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Ah... Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: ...Are you bullying Sanji again?

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Father-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why should I?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's clear as day that you'll be useless as a warrior in the future.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no obligation to help you, and I see no worth in raising you either!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're NOTHING BUT A STAIN... A DISGRACE TO OUR FAMILY NAME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Driy, drip

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kyaha- Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get up! I'll give you some of my personal training!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bring nothing but shame to all of us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Do it, Yonji... Charge Right at him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hell Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: bleugh HH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Were you reminisc- ing just now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that you of all people would be capable of using Haki...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He stopped the top of that spear... with his leg!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's wrong? I'll give you the courtesy of picking up a sword.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I remember training you in the way of the sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These hands of mine exist for the sole purpose of cooking.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unless you're one of the ingredients to one of my dishes,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't ever use my hands, let alone handle a sharp tool!! Using my legs and kicks are my only recourse when it comes to combat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Flick

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's a beast... hard to believe he's the same Sanji that we all remember...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I see you still have that disgusting habit of making food for a bunch of filthy rats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You fool... you must remember that Royals... were never meant to serve others!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's in one ear and right out the other with you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you have to complain about in this marriage?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 37 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
